summary: Iteration 63 - TrustSection i18n Bug Fix Verification - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified the critical i18n fix in TrustSection.js that was always showing German regardless of language setting. The fix uses useLanguage() hook instead of broken t.lang pattern. All 3 languages (DE/NL/EN) now display correct translations.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All i18n tests, section rendering, legal pages, login page passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: TrustSection i18n fix verified. The component now correctly uses useLanguage() hook to get the current language and displays appropriate translations. All 14 main sections render correctly. Legal pages (DE/NL/EN) work. Login page renders without errors.

bug_fix_verification.issue: TrustSection was always showing German regardless of language setting because it used t.lang which was undefined
bug_fix_verification.fix: Refactored TrustSection to use useLanguage() hook and moved all translations into a structured T object within the component
bug_fix_verification.verification: Confirmed that switching languages via DE/NL/EN buttons now correctly updates TrustSection content
files_changed: /app/frontend/src/App.js - Line 531 updated to render <TrustSection /> without t prop
